getAcceptedAt() - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.database.EntrantDB.EnrolledEntrantInfo
 
getAdminId() - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.model.Admin
Returns the unique identifier for this admin.
getAllEvents(OnSuccessListener<List<Event>>, OnFailureListener) - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.database.AdminDB
Fetches all event documents from Firestore and returns them as a list of Event objects via the success listener.
getAllEvents(OnSuccessListener<List<Event>>, OnFailureListener) - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.database.EventDB
Fetches all events from Firestore.
getAllNotifications(OnSuccessListener<List<Notification>>, OnFailureListener) - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.database.NotificationDB
Fetches all notification documents from Firestore and returns them as a list of Notification objects via the success listener.
getAllProfiles(OnSuccessListener<List<Profile>>, OnFailureListener) - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.database.AdminDB
Fetches all user profile documents from Firestore and returns them as a list of Profile objects via the success listener.
getCancelledEntrantIds() - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.model.LotteryPool
Returns the list of device IDs of entrants who were cancelled by the organizer.

Returns the list of device IDs of entrants who declined their invitation.

getDeviceId() - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.model.Profile
Returns the unique device identifier associated with this profile.
getDrawSize() - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.model.LotteryPool
Returns the number of entrants to sample in a lottery draw.
getEmail() - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.model.Admin
Returns the email address used by the admin to log in.
getEmail() - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.model.Profile
Returns the email address of the user.

Fetches an entrant document from Firestore by device ID and returns it as an Entrant object via the success listener.

getEventId() - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.model.Notification
Returns the ID of the event this notification is associated with.
getEventId() - Method in class com.example.cmput301_app.model.Poster
Returns the ID of the event this poster belongs to.

Sets up a real-time listener for events created by a specific organizer.

Returns the last known geolocation of the user.
